slides.title: wick
slides.tagline: A zero-knowledge agentic ledger to interrupt behavioral variance, and enforce systematic execution.

slides.title: The Problem: Traders Are Blind To Their Own Variance
slides.subtitle: Retail trading is a $27B market, but the infrastructure is stuck in the past, forcing traders to choose between scattered spreadsheets or sacrificing their data sovereignty.

sections.heading: Win rate Delta at an all time high
sections.description: Across 560M crypto traders worldwide, most track executions in scattered spreadsheets and broker statements—if they track at all. Without a unified system, patterns remain invisible, turning improvement into gambling rather than data-driven strategy.

sections.heading: Edge Compromise
sections.description: 100% of incumbent journals (CoinMarketMan, TradeZella) operate on cloud architecture. The $6.08M average cost of FinTech data breaches has created a massive privacy vacuum.

sections.heading: No modern solutions
sections.description: Crypto trader trapped in a behavioural loop they cannot see. Current tools show prices but lack behavioural context, forcing manual analysis of patterns that determine profitability. With zero local-first solutions available, true execution insight remains inaccessible at scale.

slides.title: Wick: The First Local-First, AI-Native Trading Journal
slides.subtitle: We have built a Swift-native powerhouse that replaces scattered spreadsheets and vulnerable cloud journals with a high-performance, private ecosystem designed to turn trading activity into a consistent win rate.

existingWay.heading: Existing Journals
points: Post-session entry — the behavioral context of the trade is already gone
Proprietary strategies stored on third-party servers — breach risk is real
Retroactive analytics with no intelligence layer — tells you what happened, never why you won

points.label: Sovereign Intelligence
points.description: On-device LLMs (Apple Silicon) analyze your edge without data ever hitting our servers.

points.label: Seamless Ecosystem
points.description: Native iOS/macOS experience with Lock Screen widgets and encrypted iCloud Sync.

points.label: Behavioral AI
points.description: Our local AI identifies psychological patterns to move you toward systematic execution.

points.label: Zero-Leak Infra
points.description: Eliminating the cloud-middleman. No web2 vulnerabilities or data breaches—pure performance.

slides.title: Edge compute unlocks institutional analytics with zero server costs.
slides.subtitle: The convergence of privacy demands and on-device neural engines makes Wick the inevitable next step in trading infrastructure.

sections.heading: The Catalyst
sections.description: Traders now treat trading like a business and demand data sovereignty. Cloud-synced journals expose proprietary alpha to third parties.

sections.heading: Edge Compute is Ready
sections.description: For the first time, mobile devices have the neural engines required to run complex behavioral AI locally. Zero cloud latency, zero server costs.

sections.heading: Retail Institutionalization
sections.description: Retail traders demand institutional-grade analytics but refuse the clunky, desktop-era UX of legacy tools.

slides.title: Market Size & Projections
slides.subtitle: Zero privacy-native competitors in a massive market with accelerating distrust of cloud platforms.

slides.title: Incumbents are treating trader history as a product to harvest.
slides.subtitle: Cloud-based competitors are built on an outdated, high-friction architecture.
slides.bottomLine: Competitors like Edgewonk and TradeZella cannot pivot to match our privacy or real-time AI without entirely rebuilding their cloud-dependent architectures from scratch.
